nodes.label: AI as data manipulation tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help manage our team's email inboxes every day

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI failure on nuanced operational tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it kept giving me hours of the main store and not the pharmacy inside the store

nodes.label: AI as practical labor-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI causing job loss or resistance
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to reduce my staffing by 3 people in my call center by using AI to distribute tasks

nodes.label: AI as strategic thinking partner
nodes.label_negative: AI causing skill atrophy or stagnation
nodes.grounding_span: I am not able to focus more on financial improvements elsewhere that I wasn't able to get to before

nodes.label: AI as efficient literature and data processing tool
nodes.label_negative: AI limitation in operational warehouse planning
nodes.grounding_span: AI is great at writing documents, processing data, and helping improve resumes, but hasn't been great at operations and planning for warehousing

nodes.label: Efficiency and cost reduction
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to reduce my staffing by 3 people in my call center

nodes.label: Strategic growth and improvement
nodes.grounding_span: I am not able to focus more on financial improvements elsewhere

nodes.label: Trust and understanding in technology adoption
nodes.grounding_span: people don't trust what they don't understand but once they saw how it could save them time

nodes.label: Excitement about AI's potential for automation
nodes.grounding_span: I am all about putting everything into AI that I can

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: it kept giving me hours of the main store and not the pharmacy inside the store and we wasted 2 hours

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: the AI was able to group stores together for me and tell me where induction points should be

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to grow the relationship

nodes.label: Pragmatic efficiency — prefers quick, direct use over iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I am adjusting my instructions to get the AI to make changes to the data

nodes.label: Opportunity-seeking task delegation mindset
nodes.grounding_span: My hope is to move it into AI and then onto the next area for me to work on
